nasb.text: But during the night an angel of the Lord opened the gates of the prison, and taking them out he said,

esv.text: But during the night an angel of the Lord opened the prison doors and brought them out, and said,

cnv.text: 夜間有一位天使，打開監門，把他們領出來，說：

ccb.text: 当天晚上，有一位主的天使把狱门打开，领他们出来，

csbs.text: 但在夜里，主的一位天使打开了监门，领他们出来，说：
